subject: RouteForcast password reset
body:
Hello Riley,

A password reset has been requested for your RouteForcast account.
Reason: Support-assisted password reset

Use this reset link:
http://127.0.0.1:5173/reset-password?token=mAyGCjaOW3R5H97NCIrtnJ_soSBh0NdbyVjil4Pm2vk

This link expires in 120 minutes.

metadata.fallback_reason: SendGrid is not installed in this environment.
